steps.title: Use the reciprocal relationship
steps.content: Start with $$\frac{x}{8}=5.$$ Taking the reciprocal of both sides preserves equality (since both sides are non-zero): $$\frac{8}{x}=\frac{1}{5}.$$

steps.title: Convert to decimal
steps.content:
Simplify $$\frac{1}{5}$$ to a decimal: $$\frac{1}{5}=0.2.$$ This matches the value we need for $$\frac{8}{x}$$.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
